description_long: This rifle features a compact, utilitarian design with a straight, tubular barrel and a rectangular receiver. The stock is minimalistic, appearing as a simple metal rod extending from the rear, and the grip is integrated into the lower receiver. The magazine is a box type, inserted vertically beneath the receiver, and the trigger guard is prominent. The sighting system is a basic iron sight mounted on top of the receiver, and the muzzle is plain with no visible attachments. The overall finish is matte black, giving it a subdued, tactical appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, matte black rifle with a tubular barrel, minimal stock, box magazine, and iron sights. Its utilitarian design is suited for tactical use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the tubular barrel, minimal stock, box magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle, narrow barrel profile, and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, grip, and the simple, straight stock design.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the stock, the back of the receiver, and the rear iron sight.
